# STRAT.061 ? 7 Habits (Covey)

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** strategic_frameworks
**Subcategory:** self_development
**Domain:** SELF_DEVELOPMENT
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Be proactive; begin with end; put first things first; think win-win; seek first to understand; synergize; sharpen the saw

## Application
Take initiative; vision-driven; prioritize important; mutual benefit; empathic listening; creative cooperation; continuous renewal

## Key Values
- Proactivity
- Vision
- Priorities
- Win-win
- Understanding
- Synergy
- Renewal

## Tags
philosophy, strategic-framework, self_development

## Notes
Strategic framework ingested into philosophy library per operator mapping rule.
